name: Crop and animal production, hunting and related service activities
description: Includes production of crops for human consumption, animal production, hunting, and related services. Covers agriculture, livestock, forestry and fishing activities.

name: Forestry and logging
description: Includes forestry activities such as logging, production of wood for fuel and charcoal, and collection of non-wood forest products.

name: Fishing and aquaculture
description: Includes fishing, fish farming, aquaculture production and related activities.

name: Mining of coal and lignite
description: Extraction of coal, lignite, and related mining activities.

name: Extraction of crude petroleum and natural gas
description: Extraction and processing of crude oil, natural gas, and related petroleum products.

name: Mining of metal ores
description: Extraction of ferrous and non-ferrous metal ores including iron, copper, precious metals.

name: Mining of other non-metallic minerals
description: Extraction of stones, sand, gravel, clay, salt and other non-metallic minerals.

name: Specialized mining and quarrying services
description: Support activities for mining and quarrying including drilling and site preparation.

name: Manufacture of food products
description: Production of food products including meat, dairy, grain, bakery and beverage manufacturing.

name: Manufacture of beverages
description: Production of beverages including alcoholic and non-alcoholic drinks.

name: Manufacture of tobacco products
description: Manufacturing of tobacco products and cigarettes.

name: Manufacture of textiles
description: Production of textiles, fabrics, yarn and thread manufacturing.

name: Manufacture of wearing apparel
description: Production of clothing, footwear, and accessories.

name: Manufacture of leather and related products
description: Tanning, dressing and processing of leather; manufacture of leather goods.

name: Manufacture of wood and wood products
description: Sawmilling, planing of wood, production of wooden furniture and wood products.

name: Manufacture of paper and paper products
description: Pulp, paper and paperboard manufacturing; production of paper products.

name: Printing and reproduction of recorded media
description: Printing and publishing services, reproduction of media.

name: Manufacture of coke and refined petroleum products
description: Refining of crude oil and production of coke and coal products.

name: Manufacture of chemicals and chemical products
description: Manufacturing of chemicals, pharmaceuticals, plastics and rubber products.

name: Manufacture of basic pharmaceutical products and pharmaceutical preparations
description: Production of basic pharmaceutical substances and medicinal preparations.

name: Manufacture of rubber and plastic products
description: Processing of rubber and plastic materials into finished products.

name: Manufacture of non-metallic mineral products
description: Production of cement, glass, ceramics and other non-metallic mineral products.

name: Manufacture of basic metals
description: Production of iron, steel and non-ferrous metals.

name: Manufacture of fabricated metal products
description: Manufacture of metal structures, fasteners, tools and other metal products.

name: Manufacture of computer, electronic and optical products
description: Manufacturing of computers, semiconductors, electronic and optical instruments.

name: Manufacture of electrical machinery and apparatus
description: Production of motors, generators, transformers and electrical equipment.

name: Manufacture of machinery and equipment not elsewhere classified
description: Manufacturing of general-purpose and special-purpose machinery.

name: Manufacture of motor vehicles, trailers and semi-trailers
description: Production of automobiles, trucks, buses and related vehicles.

name: Manufacture of other transport equipment
description: Production of ships, aircraft, railway equipment and other transport equipment.

name: Manufacture of furniture
description: Manufacturing of furniture for homes, offices and public spaces.

name: Other manufacturing
description: Manufacturing of jewelry, musical instruments, sports goods and other miscellaneous items.

name: Repair and installation of machinery and equipment
description: Specialized repair and installation services for machinery and equipment.

name: Electricity, gas, steam and air conditioning supply
description: Generation and supply of electricity, gas, steam and cooling services.

name: Water collection, treatment and supply
description: Collection, treatment and distribution of water for domestic and industrial use.

name: Sewerage
description: Operation of sewerage systems and wastewater treatment services.

name: Waste collection, treatment and disposal activities
description: Waste collection, treatment, recycling and disposal services.

name: Remediation activities and other waste management services
description: Site remediation and specialized waste management services.

name: Construction of buildings
description: Construction and development of residential and non-residential buildings.

name: Civil engineering
description: Construction of roads, railways, bridges, tunnels and other infrastructure.

name: Specialized construction activities
description: Electrical, plumbing, painting and other specialized construction services.

name: Wholesale and retail trade and repair of motor vehicles and motorcycles
description: Sale and repair of automobiles, motorcycles and related services.

name: Wholesale trade, except of motor vehicles and motorcycles
description: Wholesale distribution and trading of goods.

name: Retail trade, except of motor vehicles and motorcycles
description: Retail sales of goods to consumers in stores and other outlets.

name: Land transport and transport via pipelines
description: Passenger and freight transport by road, rail and pipeline.

name: Water transport
description: Passenger and freight transport by water vessels.

name: Air transport
description: Passenger and freight transport by aircraft.

name: Warehousing and support activities for transportation
description: Warehousing, cargo handling and other transport support services.

name: Postal and courier activities
description: Postal service operations and courier activities.

name: Accommodation
description: Hotels, motels, inns, guest houses and other accommodation services.

name: Food and beverage service activities
description: Restaurants, cafes, bars and food service operations.

name: Publishing activities
description: Publishing of books, journals, newspapers and electronic publications.

name: Motion picture, video and television programme production, sound recording and music publishing activities
description: Production of films, videos, television programs, and music publishing.

name: Programming and broadcasting activities
description: Radio and television broadcasting and content programming.

name: Telecommunications
description: Fixed and mobile telecommunications services.

name: Computer programming, consultancy and related activities
description: Software development, IT consulting, data processing and related services.

name: Information service activities
description: Information technology services, web hosting, and data management.

description: Banking, financial intermediation and investment services.

description: Insurance brokerage, investment advisory and related services.

description: Real estate trading, rental and related services.

name: Legal and accounting activities
description: Law firms, accounting services and auditing.

description: Management consulting, business strategy and headquarters services.

description: Research and experimental development in sciences, engineering and social sciences.

description: Advertising, market research and public relations services.

description: Veterinary services, design, photographic and translation services.

name: Veterinary activities
description: Animal health services and veterinary practice.

name: Rental and leasing activities
description: Rental and leasing of machinery, equipment and other goods.

name: Employment activities
description: Recruitment, temporary staffing and employment services.

description: Travel booking, tour operations and reservation services.

name: Security and investigation activities
description: Security services, investigation and surveillance.

description: Building cleaning, facility management and landscaping services.

description: Administrative support, call centers and office services.

description: Government administration, defense and public services.

description: Primary, secondary, higher and adult education services.

name: Human health activities
description: Hospital services, medical practice, nursing care and health services.

name: Residential care activities
description: Elderly care, disabled care and residential social services.

name: Social work activities without accommodation
description: Social assistance services, child care and counseling.

name: Creative, arts and entertainment activities
description: Arts, entertainment, museums, libraries and cultural activities.

name: Libraries, archives, museums and other cultural activities
description: Operation of cultural institutions and heritage preservation.

name: Gambling and betting activities
description: Casinos, betting and gaming services.

description: Sports clubs, recreation facilities and entertainment services.

description: Religious, political, professional and other membership organizations.

description: Repair and maintenance services for personal goods and electronics.

description: Laundry, hair dressing, funeral services and other personal services.
